rulings.Case Title: JAMES SALINAS SR VS. NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Arbitrator Pursuant To Ccp 1281.9, 1281.91 And Stay Arbitration Between Pltf And Deft Northern California Carpenters Regional Council
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JANUARY 23, 2009 LINE 14, PLAINTIFF JAMES SALINAS SR.'S Motion To Disqualify Arbitrator Pursuant To CCP 1281.9, 1281.91 And Stay Arbitration Between Plaintiff And Defendant Northern California Carpenters Regional Council. GRANT DISQUALIFICATION, BECAUSE MCKAY DID NOT COMPLY WITH CCP 1281.9(a)(3) and (a)(4). PARTIES TO COMPLY WITH ALTERNATE ARBITRATOR SELECTION AS FOUND IN CMA. ARBITRATION CLAUSE NOT UNCONSCIONABLE AND COURT SEVERS FEE PROVISION. =(302/PHA/PB)
